corrections.current: μακρόθυμος καὶ ἐλέει διοικῶν τὰ πάντα.
corrections.correct: μακρόθυμος καὶ ἐλέει διοικῶν τὰ πάντα·
corrections.note: Printed punctuation is middle dot, not full stop.
Second siglum is ℵc.a, not ℵA.
Line break created a false split; image shows ομ η ℵ* followed by parenthetical hab ℵc.a.

corrections.current: αφροσιν] αφρονι A* Aᶜ vid (-σιν ℵc.aAa)
corrections.correct: αφροσιν] αφρονι ℵ* A* vid (-σιν ℵc.aAa)
corrections.note: Apparatus includes ℵ* before A* vid; transcript misread sigla.

notes: Running head and page number match. Body mostly correct aside from one omitted letter and punctuation. Apparatus contains a few siglum/layout misreadings; page number 631 correctly present.
